name: umple-lsp-monorepo
description: Monorepo for Umple Language Server and editor clients

scripts.build-grammar: cd packages/tree-sitter-umple && npx tree-sitter generate && npx tree-sitter build --wasm && cd ../.. && npm run copy-wasm && tsc -b
scripts.copy-wasm: cp packages/tree-sitter-umple/tree-sitter-umple.wasm packages/server/tree-sitter-umple.wasm && cp packages/tree-sitter-umple/queries/references.scm packages/server/references.scm && cp packages/tree-sitter-umple/queries/definitions.scm packages/server/definitions.scm && cp packages/tree-sitter-umple/queries/completions.scm packages/server/completions.scm && cp packages/tree-sitter-umple/queries/highlights.scm packages/server/highlights.scm
scripts.test: npm run compile && npm test -w packages/server && npm run parse:corpus:self-test && npm run format:corpus:self-test
